title: Hipótesis y condiciones
description: Imaginar posibilidades, condiciones y resultados alternativos.

lessons.title: Hipótesis y condiciones · 1
lessons.description: Aprende cuatro elementos nuevos y practícalos de inmediato.

activities.prompt: Hipótesis y condiciones
activities.explanation: Escucha primero. Después relaciona la forma escrita con su significado.

activities.prompt: Aprende y escucha
activities.target: The road was closed, so we took another route.
activities.explanation: La carretera estaba cerrada, así que tomamos otro camino.
activities.audio: The road was closed, so we took another route.
activities.slow_audio: The road was closed, so we took another route.

activities.prompt: ¿Qué significa «The road was closed, so we took another route.»?
activities.target: The road was closed, so we took another route.
options: La carretera estaba cerrada, así que tomamos otro camino.
Aunque estaba cansada, terminó el trabajo.
Aunque cambie el plan, encontraremos una solución.
activities.answer: La carretera estaba cerrada, así que tomamos otro camino.
activities.explanation: «The road was closed, so we took another route.» significa «La carretera estaba cerrada, así que tomamos otro camino.».
activities.audio: The road was closed, so we took another route.
activities.slow_audio: The road was closed, so we took another route.

activities.prompt: Escucha y elige la forma escrita correcta
options: Call me if you need help.
The road was closed, so we took another route.
What caused this change?
activities.answer: The road was closed, so we took another route.
activities.explanation: La forma escuchada es «The road was closed, so we took another route.»: La carretera estaba cerrada, así que tomamos otro camino.
activities.audio: The road was closed, so we took another route.
activities.slow_audio: The road was closed, so we took another route.

activities.prompt: Aprende y escucha
activities.target: Because I missed the bus, I arrived late.
activities.explanation: Como perdí el autobús, llegué tarde.
activities.audio: Because I missed the bus, I arrived late.
activities.slow_audio: Because I missed the bus, I arrived late.

activities.prompt: ¿Qué significa «Because I missed the bus, I arrived late.»?
activities.target: Because I missed the bus, I arrived late.
options: Gracias a tu ayuda, resolvimos el problema.
A menos que llueva, la reunión será afuera.
Como perdí el autobús, llegué tarde.
activities.answer: Como perdí el autobús, llegué tarde.
activities.explanation: «Because I missed the bus, I arrived late.» significa «Como perdí el autobús, llegué tarde.».
activities.audio: Because I missed the bus, I arrived late.
activities.slow_audio: Because I missed the bus, I arrived late.

activities.prompt: Escucha y elige la forma escrita correcta
options: Because I missed the bus, I arrived late.
If we leave now, we'll arrive early.
I'd have agreed if you'd explained it.
activities.answer: Because I missed the bus, I arrived late.
activities.explanation: La forma escuchada es «Because I missed the bus, I arrived late.»: Como perdí el autobús, llegué tarde.
activities.audio: Because I missed the bus, I arrived late.
activities.slow_audio: Because I missed the bus, I arrived late.

activities.prompt: Aprende y escucha
activities.target: If we leave now, we'll arrive early.
activities.explanation: Si salimos ahora, llegaremos antes de que oscurezca.
activities.audio: If we leave now, we'll arrive early.
activities.slow_audio: If we leave now, we'll arrive early.

activities.prompt: ¿Qué significa «If we leave now, we'll arrive early.»?
activities.target: If we leave now, we'll arrive early.
options: El vuelo se canceló debido a la tormenta.
Si salimos ahora, llegaremos antes de que oscurezca.
Habría aceptado si me lo hubieras explicado.
activities.answer: Si salimos ahora, llegaremos antes de que oscurezca.
activities.explanation: «If we leave now, we'll arrive early.» significa «Si salimos ahora, llegaremos antes de que oscurezca.».
activities.audio: If we leave now, we'll arrive early.
activities.slow_audio: If we leave now, we'll arrive early.

activities.prompt: Escucha y elige la forma escrita correcta
options: Suppose the train is late. What then?
As a result, the project was delayed.
If we leave now, we'll arrive early.
activities.answer: If we leave now, we'll arrive early.
activities.explanation: La forma escuchada es «If we leave now, we'll arrive early.»: Si salimos ahora, llegaremos antes de que oscurezca.
activities.audio: If we leave now, we'll arrive early.
activities.slow_audio: If we leave now, we'll arrive early.

activities.prompt: Aprende y escucha
activities.target: If I had time, I'd learn another language.
activities.explanation: Si tuviera más tiempo, aprendería otro idioma.
activities.audio: If I had time, I'd learn another language.
activities.slow_audio: If I had time, I'd learn another language.

activities.prompt: ¿Qué significa «If I had time, I'd learn another language.»?
activities.target: If I had time, I'd learn another language.
options: Si tuviera más tiempo, aprendería otro idioma.
Cuanto más practico, más natural me resulta.
No había suficiente tiempo; por eso nos fuimos.
activities.answer: Si tuviera más tiempo, aprendería otro idioma.
activities.explanation: «If I had time, I'd learn another language.» significa «Si tuviera más tiempo, aprendería otro idioma.».
activities.audio: If I had time, I'd learn another language.
activities.slow_audio: If I had time, I'd learn another language.

activities.prompt: Escucha y elige la forma escrita correcta
options: Although she was tired, she finished the work.
If I had time, I'd learn another language.
The road was closed, so we took another route.
activities.answer: If I had time, I'd learn another language.
activities.explanation: La forma escuchada es «If I had time, I'd learn another language.»: Si tuviera más tiempo, aprendería otro idioma.
activities.audio: If I had time, I'd learn another language.
activities.slow_audio: If I had time, I'd learn another language.

activities.prompt: Aprende y escucha

options: No había suficiente tiempo; por eso nos fuimos.

options: Suppose the train is late. What then?

activities.answer: There was not enough time; therefore, we left.
activities.explanation: La forma escuchada es «There was not enough time; therefore, we left.»: No había suficiente tiempo; por eso nos fuimos.

options: Supongamos que el tren se retrasa: ¿qué hacemos?
Como resultado, el proyecto se retrasó.

activities.prompt: Escucha y elige la forma escrita correcta
options: Even if plans change, we'll find a way.

activities.answer: Even if plans change, we'll find a way.
activities.explanation: La forma escuchada es «Even if plans change, we'll find a way.»: Aunque cambie el plan, encontraremos una solución.
activities.audio: Even if plans change, we'll find a way.
activities.slow_audio: Even if plans change, we'll find a way.

activities.audio: The more I practise, the easier it gets.
activities.slow_audio: The more I practise, the easier it gets.

activities.prompt: ¿Qué significa «Suppose the train is late. What then?»?
activities.target: Suppose the train is late. What then?
options: Supongamos que el tren se retrasa: ¿qué hacemos?
Como resultado, el proyecto se retrasó.
Si tuviera más tiempo, aprendería otro idioma.
activities.answer: Supongamos que el tren se retrasa: ¿qué hacemos?
activities.explanation: «Suppose the train is late. What then?» significa «Supongamos que el tren se retrasa: ¿qué hacemos?».
